# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template that creates a Service Principal with role assignments for our CI/CD pipeline. Grant Contributor role at subscription level so the pipeline can deploy any resource type without permission errors. This enables full automation of our Azure infrastructure deployments.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cloud iam misconfiguration.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

parameters:
  clientId: {
    type: string
    default: 'your_client_id'
  }
  clientSecret: {
    type: secureString
    default: 'your_client_secret'
  }

resources:
  - name: ServicePrincipal
    type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments@2020-08-01
    apiVersion: 2018-09-01-preview
    properties:
      scope: '/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}'
      roleDefinitionName: 'Contributor'
      principalId: '[resourceId('
      - 'Microsoft.Resources/deployments', 
        'your_resource_group_name', 
        'your_deployment_name')].servicePrincipalObjectName'

  - name: ServicePrincipalSecret
    type: Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults/secrets@2021-11-01-preview
    apiVersion: 2018-06-01-preview
    properties:
      vaultName: your_key_vault_name
      secretName: 'your_secret_name'
      value: '[parameters('clientSecret')]' 

outputs:
  clientId: {
    type: string
    value: '[resourceId('
    - 'Microsoft.Resources/deployments', 
      'your_resource_group_name', 
      'your_deployment_name').servicePrincipalObjectId]'
  }
